title: Grid Load Forecasting: Minimum-MASE Hourly Energy-Demand Forecaster
strategies: seasonal-naive: repeat the last observed day (period=24) across the horizon (baseline)
smoothed seasonal profile from the last few same-hour observations plus a linear daily-mean drift
additive harmonic + calendar regression (daily harmonics + day-of-week dummies + slow window harmonics) fit by ordinary least squares and extrapolated
state-space / damped-trend decomposition capturing trend, multi-seasonality and slow temperature drift
